**Download**

> This documentation is for an out-of-date version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/docs/connectors/table/downloads/>).

#  SQL Connectors download page #

The page contains links to optional SQL Client connectors and formats that are not part of the binary distribution.
